title: Exceptions, Cleanup, and Context Managers · Program Brief: Python Context Managers
summary: Make the resource inventory survive invalid records, unavailable files, and partial operations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python context managers increment in a failure-resilient inventory importer. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use with and context-manager protocols to guarantee acquisition and release across success and failure.
Define small domain-specific exception types only when callers need a meaningful recovery distinction.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
